title: Universal pack
description: This modpack is for Based modpack for other modpack, and getting the best performance possible.
body:
This modpack is for Based modpack for other modpack, and getting the best performance possible.

The modpack includes only vanilla plus mods like Farmer Delight, performance mods, tweak mods, etc.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/MpO2YX2e9rA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Feel free to use it, all the mods are just my favorite mods.

Also if you want to know what optimization mod i use it in here: https://modrinth.com/collection/VBQIj575
